problem: How to engineer materials that autonomously repair microcracks before failure?
hypothesis: If Polymer crosslinking under specific stimulus is applied to microcracks, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 36 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: If you want to find the secrets of the universe, think in terms of energy, frequency and vibration. — Tesla
